featured.body: Our comprehensive approach to site selection ensures maximum returns for our investment partners.

statementOfValue.heading: Statement of Value
paragraphs: At REDI Sites, we specialize in representing the readiness of commercial properties for development, providing clear and transparent evaluations that help streamline project planning. Our expert team assesses key factors such as infrastructure, zoning compliance, and environmental conditions to deliver precise insights that support effective time-to-market strategies.

By offering detailed reports and ongoing project management support, we help investors and developers reduce uncertainty and accelerate decision-making. Our transparent approach ensures all stakeholders have a clear understanding of site potential and challenges, enabling smoother coordination and faster project execution.

Choosing REDI Sites means partnering with a team committed to enhancing transparency and efficiency throughout the development process. We empower clients to make informed decisions quickly, minimizing delays and maximizing the value of their commercial real estate investments.

mission.heading: Mission Statement & Goals
paragraphs: At REDI Sites, we are dedicated to providing comprehensive evaluations of commercial properties to assess their readiness for development. Our seasoned team conducts in-depth analyses of critical factors including infrastructure quality, zoning regulations, environmental considerations, and current market demand. We combine data-driven insights with local market expertise to deliver thorough reports that empower investors and developers to make informed decisions.

Our process begins with a detailed site assessment, examining utilities, transportation access, and compliance with local zoning laws. We then evaluate economic trends and demographic shifts to gauge market potential. By integrating these elements, we identify properties that offer the best opportunities for successful development projects.

Partnering with REDI Sites means gaining access to exclusive information and expert guidance that reduces risk and accelerates project timelines. We strive to connect our clients with prime commercial sites that align with their strategic goals, ensuring smarter investments and sustainable growth. Trust REDI Sites to be your partner in unlocking the full potential of commercial real estate development.

guildMission.heading: Site Selector's Guild Mission & Vision
bullets: Raising the awareness of the value that professional location strategy and business site selection services create for corporations
Sharing thought leadership and best practices
Developing and nurturing relations between Site Selectors Guild members, economic development organizations and corporate stakeholders
Contributing to policy discussions that affect location strategy and the future of our profession.
guildMission.ctaLabel: Find A Site Selector | Site Selectors Guild

businessModel.heading: Our Business Model
paragraphs: We help businesses find the perfect location for their operations by analyzing factors like infrastructure, labor availability, market access, and regulatory environment.

Our expert guidance ensures companies choose sites that align with their strategic goals, optimizing costs and operational efficiency. We work closely with stakeholders to evaluate potential locations, providing insights that support informed decisions and successful project outcomes.

hero.heading: Our Approach
hero.body: REDI (Readiness Evaluation for Development and Investment) Sites is the new national standard in assessing site readiness for U.S. office and industrial projects. Administered by the Site Selectors Guild, REDI Sites provides a searchable database of available sites that have undergone rigorous assessment set by the world's foremost group of site selection consultants.

image.alt: Historic rail depot along active tracks, badged with a REDI Sites Platinum rating

methodology.heading: REDI Scores Methodology
paragraphs: Businesses and economic development organizations can register for the site readiness program. Applicants will submit various documents and information to be assessed and given a score and designation level (bronze, silver, gold or platinum) based on the site's level of readiness as determined by the Site Selectors Guild. Sites that don't meet the bronze level will receive a designation as an emerging site.
The designation is valid for one calendar year, and if further actions are taken to increase the site's readiness for development, the site can be resubmitted and redesignated.
benefits: Listing of your site in a national database, instantly searchable by any SSG member
Nationally recognized designation for site readiness and include in your marketing materials
Know how to level up site designation and reapply when more due diligence is completed
Benefit from the Guild's own marketing of the program to corporations
